field.label: Cuil
field.help: Numero de Documento Nacional de Identidad

field.label: Categoria.
field.expression: CONCAT((select nombre from SECCIONHISTORIA left join SECCION on SECCION.id_seccion = SECCIONHISTORIA.id_seccion where SECCIONHISTORIA.IdPersona = PERSONAL.IdPersona order by SECCIONHISTORIA.fechaDesde desc limit 1),' - ', (select descripcion from CATEGHISTORIA left join CATPERSONAL on CATPERSONAL.IdSindicato = CATEGHISTORIA.idSindicato and CATPERSONAL.IdCateg = CATEGHISTORIA.IdCateg where CATEGHISTORIA.IdPersona = PERSONAL.IdPersona and CATEGHISTORIA.fechaDesde < CURDATE() order by CATEGHISTORIA.fechaDesde desc limit 1))

select tipoliq FROM CONCEPCONV inner join CONVENIOS on CONVENIOS.idSindicato= CONCEPCONV.IdSindicato where CONCEPCONV.IdSindicato = PERSONAL.IdSindicato and CONCEPCONV.IdCateg = PERSONAL.IdCateg limit 1
field.label: Tipo Liq.
Lunes
field.expression: select concat(ingreso, ' - ', egreso) from HORARIOHIST where dia = 2 order by desdeFecha Desc limit 1

field.label: Martes
field.expression: select concat(ingreso, ' - ', egreso) from HORARIOHIST where dia = 3 order by desdeFecha Desc limit 1

field.label: Miércoles
field.expression: select concat(ingreso, ' - ', egreso) from HORARIOHIST where dia = 4 order by desdeFecha Desc limit 1

field.label: Jueves
field.expression: select concat(ingreso, ' - ', egreso) from HORARIOHIST where dia = 5 order by desdeFecha Desc limit 1

field.label: Viernes
field.expression: select concat(ingreso, ' - ', egreso) from HORARIOHIST where dia = 6 order by desdeFecha Desc limit 1

field.label: Sábado
field.expression: select concat(ingreso, ' - ', egreso) from HORARIOHIST where dia = 7 and ingreso != egreso order by desdeFecha Desc limit 1
